instruction:
Apply the exact harbor patch: lighthouse-window color, light-beam position, extra-pier-buoy removal, sail-small fill, harbor-wave-long path, and crate-left position.

Patch:
- crate-left.x: 4 -> 12
- crate-left.y: 81 -> 76
- harbor-wave-long.d: "M82 116 C96 126 112 108 128 116 S158 126 174 116" -> "M82 118 C98 112 112 124 128 118 S158 112 174 118"
- sail-small.fill: "#fef3c7" -> "#e0f2fe"
- remove extra-pier-buoy
- light-beam.points: [[188,26],[140,14],[140,38]] -> [[180,30],[132,18],[132,42]]
- lighthouse-window.fill: "#38bdf8" -> "#fde047"
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="140" fill="#f5fffd" />
  <rect id="sky" fill="#dbeafe" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" />
  <rect id="water" fill="#06b6d4" x="0" y="70" width="220" height="70" />
  <line id="horizon" stroke="#0284c7" stroke-width="2" x1="0" y1="70" x2="220" y2="70" />
  <circle id="sun" fill="#fde047" cx="190" cy="22" r="12" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-left" fill="#f8fafc" cx="36" cy="26" rx="18" ry="7" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-right" fill="#f8fafc" cx="56" cy="25" rx="14" ry="6" />
  <rect id="pier-deck" fill="#92400e" x="0" y="88" width="72" height="10" />
  <path id="rope-coil" fill="none" stroke="#f8fafc" stroke-width="2" d="M48 82 C58 72 70 74 70 84 C70 94 54 96 50 88 C46 80 60 78 62 86" />
  <line id="pier-leg-1" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="16" y1="96" x2="13" y2="132" />
  <line id="pier-leg-2" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="56" y1="96" x2="60" y2="132" />
  <polygon id="boat-hull" fill="#f59e0b" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="84,84 158,84 146,104 96,104" />
  <rect id="boat-cabin" fill="#fefce8" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="106" y="62" width="30" height="20" />
  <rect id="cabin-window" fill="#93c5fd" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.8" x="114" y="67" width="14" height="8" />
  <line id="mast" stroke="#222" stroke-width="3" x1="126" y1="84" x2="126" y2="26" />
  <polygon id="sail-main" fill="#ecfeff" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="126,30 154,76 126,76" />
  <polygon id="sail-small" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="124,34 100,76 124,76" />
  <polygon id="flag" fill="#0f766e" points="126,25 140,29 126,33" />
  <polygon id="lighthouse-body" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="176,82 206,82 200,28 182,28" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-1" fill="#ef4444" x="181" y="48" width="20" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-2" fill="#ef4444" x="179" y="64" width="24" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-cap" fill="#0f172a" x="180" y="22" width="22" height="8" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-window" fill="#38bdf8" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.7" x="188" y="34" width="6" height="8" />
  <polygon id="light-beam" fill="#fde68a" opacity="0.45" points="188,26 140,14 140,38" />
  <circle id="buoy-red" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="42" cy="112" r="8" />
  <rect id="buoy-red-stripe" fill="#ef4444" x="35" y="110" width="14" height="4" />
  <circle id="buoy-green" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="184" cy="112" r="7" />
  <rect id="buoy-green-stripe" fill="#22c55e" x="178" y="110" width="12" height="4" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="6,122 22,118 38,122 54,118 70,122" />
  <path id="harbor-wave-long" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" d="M82 116 C96 126 112 108 128 116 S158 126 174 116" />
  <polyline id="wave-2" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="128,120 146,116 164,120 182,116 200,120" />
  <rect id="crate-left" fill="#a16207" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="4" y="81" width="14" height="12" />
  <rect id="crate-right" fill="#b45309" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="28" y="76" width="14" height="12" />
  <ellipse id="skin-16-sub-wide-body" fill="#facc15" stroke="#854d0e" stroke-width="2.2" opacity="0.9" cx="53" cy="112" rx="43" ry="18" />
  <circle id="skin-16-sub-wide-window" fill="#bae6fd" stroke="#075985" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.95" cx="42" cy="109" r="7" />
  <polygon id="skin-16-sub-wide-tail" fill="#f59e0b" stroke="#854d0e" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.9" points="93,112 116,96 116,128" />
  <ellipse id="identity-16-sub-body" fill="#facc15" stroke="#854d0e" stroke-width="1.5" cx="52" cy="112" rx="28" ry="11" />
  <circle id="identity-16-sub-window" fill="#bae6fd" stroke="#075985" stroke-width="1" cx="43" cy="110" r="4" />
  <polygon id="identity-16-sub-tail" fill="#f59e0b" stroke="#854d0e" stroke-width="1" points="80,112 94,104 94,120" />
  <polygon id="identity-16-fish" fill="#fb7185" opacity="0.95" points="152,122 166,116 166,128" />
  <circle id="variant-16-dot" fill="#0f766e" opacity="0.72" cx="42" cy="18" r="2.6" />
  <line id="variant-16-rule" stroke="#0f766e" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.58" x1="48" y1="21" x2="64" y2="24" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-01" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.68" x="12" y="5" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-02" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.68" x="43" y="6" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-03" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.68" x="80" y="4" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-04" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.68" x="111" y="5" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-05" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.68" x="148" y="6" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-06" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.68" x="179" y="4" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-07" fill="#d946ef" opacity="0.68" x="12" y="140" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-08" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.68" x="43" y="139" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-09" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.68" x="80" y="141" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-10" fill="#f97316" opacity="0.68" x="111" y="140" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-11" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.68" x="148" y="139" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-16-chip-12" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.68" x="179" y="141" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <circle id="variant-16-pin-01" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.66" cx="24" cy="23" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-16-pin-02" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.66" cx="197" cy="37" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-16-pin-03" fill="#d946ef" opacity="0.66" cx="10" cy="51" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-16-pin-04" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.66" cx="207" cy="65" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-16-pin-05" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.66" cx="20" cy="79" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-16-pin-06" fill="#f97316" opacity="0.66" cx="193" cy="93" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-16-pin-07" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.66" cx="30" cy="107" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-16-pin-08" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.66" cx="203" cy="121" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="extra-pier-buoy" fill="#facc15" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.8" cx="70" cy="112" r="5" />
</svg>
